title: Stavanger Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Stavanger with a Z-Score of -4.20. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Stavanger are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The high humidity of 77% and moderate wind speed of 9.0 km/h are exacerbating the cold temperatures. 
 The HDD value of 15.7 GG indicates a high energy demand to maintain comfortable temperatures.
conclusion: Implement emergency measures to mitigate the effects of the cold snap immediately.
